title: Up to 2-Months Free, Waived Signing Fees, and Reduced Rates! Experience Tropical Serenity: 2-Bedroom Luxury Villa with Den in Wildwood, FL
description:
Welcome to The Keys at Wildwood, a brand-new residential sanctuary where the laid-back charm of the Florida Keys meets the modern convenience of Central Florida. Located just 2.5 miles from the world-renowned shopping and dining of The Villages, our gated community offers an upscale, maintenance-free lifestyle in the heart of Oxford/Wildwood.

Our expertly designed villas redefine the rental experience. Built with high-quality concrete construction for superior noise reduction and energy efficiency, each home provides a tranquil retreat from the outside world. Inside, you’ll find spacious, single-level floor plans that evoke the true feeling of homeownership without the hassle.

Premium Home Features:

Gourmet Kitchens: Featuring granite countertops, shaker-style cabinetry, and high-end stainless steel appliances.

Smart Home Integration: Every villa is equipped with an Ambient Smart Home package, including a smart hub, keyless entry, doorbell camera, and thermostat controls.

Luxury Finishes: Enjoy 10-foot high ceilings, wide-plank flooring, and oversized walk-in closets.

Convenience Included: Every home features a full-sized washer and dryer, private driveways, and a private patio for enjoying the Florida sunshine.


At The Keys at Wildwood, your backyard is a vacation destination. Whether you’re cooling off in our exquisite resort-style pool, hitting a personal best in the fully-equipped fitness center, or letting your furry friend run free in our dedicated on-site dog park, there is something here for everyone.

Pet-Friendly Living: We welcome your four-legged family members!

Security & Service: Enjoy peace of mind with gated community access and the ultimate convenience of valet trash service.

Prime Location: Positioned perfectly on US-301, you are minutes away from The Villages Regional Hospital, Aldi, Costco, and the vibrant entertainment at Brownwood Paddock Square.

Are you looking for an affordable luxury rental near The Villages? Experience the difference of a community built with you in mind.




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $1,850 




 Application Fee: $25 



 Available Now
